g.title: topology
g.text: 7-layer pipeline | L1-L5 shared data plane | L6-L7 client-specific plane
Deploy: [VM]=co-located VM [CR Svc]=Cloud Run Service [CR Job]=Cloud Run Job

g.title: cluster_l2
g.text: L2 - Market Data Processing [Shared Data Plane]

g.title: cluster_l3
g.text: L3 - Feature Computation [Shared Data Plane] (MDPS-event-driven, not timer)

g.title: cluster_l4
g.text: L4 - Cross-Instrument + Multi-Timeframe [Shared Data Plane] (aggregates L3)

g.title: cluster_l6
g.text: co-located group: MTDH + MDPS + execution on same VM (in_memory transport)

g.title: cluster_api
g.text: UI -> API (HTTP REST + SSE) -> Service -> Storage | APIs never own data

g.title: cluster_ui
g.text: UIs [CR Svc, auto-scale] React/TypeScript static build
UI and API are SEPARATE Cloud Run Services (separate repos, separate scaling)

g.title: cluster_store
g.text: Rule: ALL services persist to GCS. Publish + persist in PARALLEL.
Consumer deduplicates by timestamp. See publish+persist panel.

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: instrument-events-{venue} Batch dims: category x venue x date Live trigger: ~15min timer poll Recovery: full re-fetch from venue REST APIs on restart
a.text: B: cat x venue x date | L: venue

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: raw-ticks-{venue}-{inst_type}-{data_type} Batch dims: category x venue x instrument_type x data_type x date Live trigger: continuous WebSocket message arrival Recovery: 1) WS reconnect exp-backoff 1s-32s 2) venue REST backfill 3) Tardis replay 4) GCS
a.text: B: cat x venue x inst_type x data_type x date

a.xlink:title: repo: features-multi-timeframe-service PubSub topic: features-multi-timeframe-{category}-{venue}-{instrument}-{timeframe} Features: tf_momentum_alignment, tf_structure_context, tf_vol_compression, tf_session_context Timeframes: 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d Category sharding included (unlike FCIS which is cross-category)
a.text: B: cat x venue x inst x tf x date | L: cat x venue x inst x tf

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: candles-{venue}-{inst_type}-{timeframe} Batch dims: category x venue x instrument_type x date x timeframe Live trigger: ~15s timer; 1m(x4), 5m(x20), 15m(x60), 1h(x240), 4h(x960), 24h(x5760) Clock-alignment: starts at even time boundary since midnight (ensures full candle blocks) Redis: ~1yr rolling candle window survives restarts (warmup from GCS on start) Recovery: subscribe live PubSub + replay GCS on separate thread; deduplicate by timestamp
a.text: B: cat x venue x inst_type x date x tf | L: venue x inst_type
Redis: ~1yr rolling candle window | Sinks: GCS + PubSub (candles-{venue}-{inst_type}-{tf})

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: orders-{client}-{subaccount}-{venue} Batch dims: client x subaccount x date Live trigger: trade signals from strategy-service via PubSub Redis: hot transient order state (NOT persistence - ephemeral) Order lifecycle events: ORDER_CREATED, ORDER_UPDATED, ORDER_CANCELLED, ORDER_FILLED, ORDER_REJECTED GAP: currently only publishes fills externally (target: full order lifecycle) Recovery: query exchange REST for open orders, restore Redis state
a.text: B: client x subaccount x date | L: client x subaccount
Redis: hot order state | Sinks: GCS + PubSub (orders-{client}-{sub}-{venue})

a.xlink:title: Port 8003 | OAuth authenticated Batch: serves historical order book snapshots and candles via HTTP REST from GCS Live: SSE orderbook from MTDH PubSub; SSE candles from MDPS PubSub GAP: currently orderbook only (target: orderbook + candles SSE)
a.text: HTTP REST + SSE orderbook + SSE candles
L: SSE orderbook (MTDH PS) + SSE candles (MDPS PS)

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: features-{category}-{venue} Batch dims: category x venue x feature_category x date Live trigger: MDPS completion PubSub event (NOT a timer) Recovery: subscribe live + replay GCS; deduplicate by timestamp
a.text: B: cat x venue x feat_cat x date | L: venue x feat_cat

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: features-{category}-{venue} Batch dims: category x venue x feature_category x date Live trigger: MDPS completion PubSub event Recovery: subscribe live + replay GCS; deduplicate by timestamp
a.text: B: cat x venue x feat_cat x date | L: venue x feat_cat

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: signals-{strategy_id}-{client} Batch dims: strategy_id x client x date Live trigger: predictions (ML inference) + market data (MDPS) + positions (PBM) via PubSub GAP: position monitoring still internal PositionMonitor (target: subscribe to PBM) Recovery: subscribe PBM for initial position snapshot, then ML + MDPS PubSub
a.text: B: strategy_id x client x date | L: strategy_id x client

a.xlink:title: NOT persistence, NOT transport. Execution-service: hot order state (ephemeral). MDPS: ~1yr rolling candle window (survives restarts via GCS warmup).
Batch only -- no live mode Batch dims: category x date Recovery: re-run batch job

PubSub topic: features-cross-instrument-{underlying} Batch dims: underlying x date Live trigger: FDS + FVS events (subscribes to ALL instruments of one underlying) Key: many-to-one aggregation - subscribes to multiple topics, publishes to one per underlying Recovery: subscribe live + replay GCS; maintain in-memory state per underlying
a.text: FDS + FVS event (many-to-one agg per underlying)
B: underlying x date | L: underlying

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: predictions-{model}-{venue}-{instrument} Batch dims: model x venue x instrument x date Live trigger: feature events from FDS/FVS/FCIS via PubSub Models: loaded from GCS (infrequent reload ~quarterly) GAP: currently reads features from BigQuery (target: PubSub subscription) Recovery: reload model from GCS, subscribe live PubSub features
a.text: B: model x venue x inst x date | L: model x venue x inst

a.xlink:title: Batch only -- no live mode Batch dims: protocol x chain x date Recovery: re-run batch job
a.text: B: protocol x chain x date (batch only)

a.xlink:title: Batch only -- no live mode Batch dims: model x instrument x timeframe x target_type x config Deploy: standalone VM (~2hr training runs; Cloud Run max timeout insufficient) Recovery: re-run batch job from checkpoint
a.text: B: model x inst x tf x target x cfg (batch only)

a.xlink:title: PLANNED - new repo: strategy-api Port 8004 | OAuth authenticated Thin FastAPI gateway over strategy-service batch outputs (signals_backtest_results GCS)
a.text: Thin FastAPI gateway over strategy-svc outputs

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: positions-{client}-{venue} Batch dims: client x venue x date Live trigger: fill events from execution + direct exchange position feed Role: reconciles execution fills vs exchange-reported positions (authoritative source) Startup: queries exchange REST for current positions -> publishes initial state Recovery: query exchange REST positions+balances, publish initial snapshot
a.text: B: client x venue x date | L: client x venue

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: pnl-{client} Batch dims: client x date Live trigger: execution events + risk metrics + position updates via PubSub Recovery: load GCS historical, subscribe execution + risk PubSub
a.text: B: client x date | L: client

a.xlink:title: Port 8002 | OAuth authenticated Batch: historical execution results from GCS Live: SSE fills and order lifecycle events from execution-service PubSub Consumed by: trading-analytics-ui, execution-analytics-ui, settlement-ui
a.text: HTTP REST + SSE fills + order lifecycle

a.xlink:title: PubSub topic: risk-{client} Batch dims: client x date Live trigger: position updates from PBM + market data from MDPS via PubSub Also publishes risk alerts to alerting-service (circuit breaker triggers) Recovery: subscribe PBM + MDPS PubSub
a.text: B: client x date | L: client

a.xlink:title: Singleton -- no sharding, no topic template Consumes: ALL lifecycle events from all services (unified events topic) Also receives: risk alerts, PBM balance alerts, execution rejection spikes Publishes: circuit-breaker-commands (halt execution+strategy) + external notifications Recovery: Cloud Run auto-restart + PubSub message retention
Port 8005 | OAuth authenticated Batch: historical P&L reports, portfolio summaries, invoices from GCS Live target: SSE P&L updates from pnl-attribution PubSub GAP: batch only currently

g.title: LEGEND
g.text: -- solid cyan (1.5px) HTTP / SSE (API->UI or API->svc)
Sinks badge on node label (no dotted edges to GCS/PubSub):
'Sinks: GCS + PubSub' = publishes live + persists batch

a.xlink:title: Consumes: deployment-api (deploy hooks) + market-data-api (feature/candle plots)
Consumes: execution-results-api + market-data-api Content migration (execution-service/visualizer-ui/ extraction) tracked separately
Consumes: execution-results-api (live fills SSE)

Port 8001 | OAuth authenticated Endpoints: deployments, services, config, data-status, service-status, cloud-builds, checklists Live: SSE endpoint for health monitoring events (-> live-health-monitor-ui) Kill switch: /kill-switch/{service}/activate (OAuth-gated, state in Secret Manager)
Consumes: strategy-api (backtest results, signal configs)
Consumes: deployment-api (SSE health events, kill switch status)

g.title: RECOVERY
g.text: 1. RPC reconnect (The Graph / Alchemy / direct node)
concurrent replay GCS + live PubSub; deduplicate by ts

a.xlink:title: Every service writes to GCS regardless of transport mode. In batch: GCS is also the transport. In live: GCS is persistence-only (PubSub is transport).

g.title: PPOLICY
g.text: Rule: publish PubSub + persist GCS in PARALLEL
(not sequentially; GCS write must not block live publish)
Result: small overlap window at live->batch merge point
2. Replay GCS up to last persisted ts (separate thread)
4. Merge point: live takes over, replay stops

a.xlink:title: Live transport only -- ephemeral. Data published to PubSub MUST also be persisted to GCS separately. Topic templates per service in node tooltips.

g.title: DEPLOYSUM
g.text: ml-training-svc (~2hr runs, Cloud Run timeout N/A)
ALL UIs serve React static build
UI and API are SEPARATE services (separate repos/scaling)

g.title: CIRCUIT
g.text: triggers: risk breach | order rejection spike
